_comment: Objectives & tutorials. Each completes when its 'trigger' event fires (optionally matching 'match'). 'reward' applies stat changes. 'unlocks' activates other objective ids. 'step' is just a label for which build introduced it. The Tasks app on the phone shows active ones.

objectives.title: Figure out who you are
objectives.desc: You woke up in a apartment that smells like ambition and mildew. At least name yourself.

objectives.title: Check your phone
objectives.desc: It's cracked, it's a hub for everything. Tap the phone button (bottom-right).

objectives.title: Open your to-do list
objectives.desc: Open the TASKS app. (You're looking at it. Meta.)

objectives.title: Know your vitals
objectives.desc: Open the STATUS app to see your needs. Stay fed, watered, and not dead.

objectives.title: Back up your life
objectives.desc: Optional but smart: Settings app, EXPORT SAVE. Drops a file you can re-import on another device.

objectives.title: Crash for the night
objectives.desc: Click the bed to sleep. Sleeping is the only way the day moves forward (and it saves your game).

objectives.title: Stretch your legs
objectives.desc: Tap anywhere on the floor to walk there. (Arrow keys / WASD work too, on a keyboard.)

objectives.title: Pick up your guitar
objectives.desc: There's a beat-up guitar in the corner. Walk over and tap it to pick it up.

objectives.title: Check your pockets
objectives.desc: Tap BAG (bottom-right) to see what you're carrying.

objectives.title: Use something
objectives.desc: Tap an item to select it, then hit Use. Eat, drink, whatever — watch your needs in Status.

objectives.title: Raid the fridge
objectives.desc: Walk to the fridge and open it, then move an item between it and your pockets (drag it, or select it and tap the move button).

objectives.title: Make some noise
objectives.desc: Open the SOUND app on your phone and play a few notes. (Tap the pads, or use your keyboard.)

objectives.title: Record a loop
objectives.desc: In the SOUND app, go to RECORD, hit record, play something, then stop and name it. It saves to your library.

objectives.title: Boot up the studio
objectives.desc: Walk to your laptop and open it. That's your DAW — where loops become songs.

objectives.title: Lay down a track
objectives.desc: Tap a loop in the LOOPS palette, then tap a track to drop it in. Hit PLAY to hear it.

objectives.title: Save your first song
objectives.desc: Arrange a few loops, then hit SAVE to keep the song. Congrats — you made a thing.

objectives.title: Step outside
objectives.desc: Head out your front door and see the block.

objectives.title: Scope out the block
objectives.desc: Tap a storefront — the pawn shop, the corner store, or the venue — to see what's there.

objectives.title: Busk for cash
objectives.desc: You're broke. Stand at the street corner with an instrument equipped and busk for tips.

objectives.title: Chip at the debt
objectives.desc: Take your money to the pawn shop and make a payment on your $350 debt.

objectives.title: Pay off the pawn shop
objectives.desc: Clear the full $350 pawn debt — your gear, free and clear. That's the goal.

objectives.title: Walk into The Dive
objectives.desc: That venue on your block — head inside and see who's hanging around.

objectives.title: Recruit a bandmate
objectives.desc: Talk to a musician in The Dive and invite them in. You'll need a saved song to prove you're worth their time.

objectives.title: Rehearse with your band
objectives.desc: Open the BAND app on your phone and REHEARSE to build chemistry. Tight bands play better shows.
